seoTitle: Clear Range vs Clemton Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Range and Clemton Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Range vs Clemton Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Range and Clemton Park.
heading: Clear Range vs Clemton Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Range, New South Wales and Clemton Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Clemton Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Range or Clemton Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Range has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Clemton Park scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Range scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Clemton Park scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Range or Clemton Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clear Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
